summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureImage Forge P1 features with REAL Slack webhook integration and Sigstore library. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Slack webhook is receiving real HTTP notifications with 200 response codes.
critical_code_review_comments: Sigstore library v4.2.0 is installed and available for keyless signing
SLSA signing currently uses HMAC fallback in dev environment (Sigstore requires OIDC token available in CI/CD)
Webhook HTTP delivery is REAL - actual HTTP POST requests sent to Slack with 200 responses
Webhook delivery history is in-memory (resets on server restart) - consider persisting to DB for production
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_p1_slack_webhook.py - Created P1 Slack webhook integration tests
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used existing Slack webhook (ID: 6e99bb58-d411-4e23-95f1-22d1aaa6e8d6) registered by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features with REAL Slack integration fully tested and working. Slack webhook URL: https://hooks.slack.com/services/T0ARVK9SNMU/B0ARU... is receiving real notifications. Sigstore v4.2.0 is installed. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/webhooks, POST /api/webhooks/{id}/test, GET /api/webhooks/delivery-history, GET /api/builds/{id}/slsa, GET /api/builds/{id}/vex. Frontend tested: Webhooks page (stats, registered webhooks, delivery history, create modal), Build Detail page (SLSA tab with provenance verification, VEX tab).
